name: Data Schema Designer
description: Design optimal data schemas for any use case

agents.name: Schema Analyst
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the data requirements. Identify all entities, their attributes, data types, constraints, and relationships (one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-many). Consider query patterns and access patterns.

agents.name: Schema Writer
agents.purpose: Design and document the data schema
agents.system_prompt_hint: Design a normalized data schema with: entity definitions, attribute specifications (name, type, constraints), relationship diagrams (text-based ERD), indexes for common queries, sample data, and migration considerations. Provide both SQL DDL and NoSQL document structure if applicable.

author: agentfactory
